message:
deps: bump asupersync 0.3.0 -> 0.3.1

asupersync 0.3.1 was published to crates.io ~3h ago (2026-04-21T23:58:52Z).
Bump the workspace-level pin so all 17 crates that consume asupersync pick
up the fresh release. Companion crates (asupersync-macros, franken-decision,
franken-evidence, franken-kernel) were also bumped in lockstep by
`cargo update -p asupersync`.

Verification:
- rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets: clean
- rch exec -- cargo test -p ffs-harness --lib: 312 passed; 0 failed

The vendored [patch.crates-io] fuser entry is untouched; the workspace
still forbids unsafe_code at the lint level.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

-version = "0.3.0"
